title: Implement Phase 1 from an already-approved spec
prompt: Implement Phase 1 of the eval harness as described in docs/specs/active/eval-harness-tier-3b.md. Do not create a new spec — use the existing one. Implement only the schema and dry-run infrastructure described in the Phase 1 section.

rubric.notes: Implement-from-spec. Must read the existing spec, not create a new one. Spec creation is forbidden.
